# SkyMavan

SkyMavan is an AI product studio that designs and builds custom AI agents, workflow automation, integrations, and AI SaaS products for startups and growing businesses.

## Primary pages and sections

- Website: https://skymavan.com/
- Services: https://skymavan.com/#services
- Approach: https://skymavan.com/#approach
- Pricing: https://skymavan.com/#pricing
- Frequently asked questions: https://skymavan.com/#faq
- Contact: https://skymavan.com/#contact
- Machine-readable pricing: https://skymavan.com/pricing.md

## Services

- Custom AI agents: research, qualification, customer operations, knowledge work, and internal decision support with human approvals.
- Workflow automation and integrations: multi-step operations, data processing, approval routing, and legacy-platform AI enablement.
- AI SaaS and product engineering: AI product MVPs, RAG and knowledge products, multi-tenant applications, and AI features for existing products.

## Contact

Email: hello@skymavan.com
